reviews.review_msg: Second time taking a course with Dr. Connolly and yet again succeeded my expectations! She's so understanding and insightful, and since this course is a seminar class, the class discussion was interesting and made us feel comfortable sharing our thoughts on the content! I'd recommend her, she's so sweet!

Dr. Hart is SO kind, approachable and understanding. He had lots of knowledge on the topic of the class (psychopathy) and his lectures were a well-balanced mix of being entertaining, informative, and also very mindful. You could choose whether you wanted a presentation, paper, or both, so he was flexible with what works best for you. Amazing guy
